kisa_anlam: The One whose existence is self-sufficient, the sole deity who creates and governs everything.
detayli_aciklama:
Allah, according to Islamic belief, is the creator of everything and the inexpressible majesty of beings. He is a unique entity that constantly directs humanity towards Himself with His distinctive attributes. The name Allah reflects His unconditional, limitless power and boundless mercy. In Islamic theology, Allah is defined as 'the Creator' or the source of existence, an unfathomable power.

All beings, gathered under a single will and power, live in harmony within a unique order created by Allah, without contradiction. The remembrances of the name Allah carry a meaning that enhances tranquility in the heart and nourishes the soul. Realizing the existence of Allah occurs not only through reason but also through the opening of the heart's eye. It is a name that facilitates a spiritual journey and the maturation of the soul.

This name also serves as a gateway to deeply understand Allah's attributes, leading one to the true meaning of existence. In moments when all kinds of suffering and distress seem insurmountable, invoking the name 'Allah' and turning towards Him offers a path that brings relief. Prayers made to Allah are not only for the fulfillment of wishes but also for establishing a spiritual connection and finding true peace.
fazileti: Reciting the name of Allah greatly contributes to a person's spiritual and moral life. Mentioning this name increases the sense of tranquility and security in the heart while simultaneously relieving a person from distress. Remembering Allah serves as a means for the acceptance of prayers and the realization of desires, depending on intention and purpose. Believers feel closer to Him by reciting the name of Allah, which also provides spiritual satisfaction.

kisa_anlam: The All-Merciful, meaning the One who encompasses everything with His infinite mercy, from which no one is deprived.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Ar-Rahman is one of the most significant attributes expressing Allah's infinite mercy. This name symbolizes the boundless and equal mercy towards all His creations, especially humanity. It holds an important place in Sufi literature and evokes deep love and respect in the hearts of believers. Indeed, Ar-Rahman is a source of light that illuminates the believers not only in this world but also in the Hereafter.

The manifestations of this name are evident in everything in the realm of existence. Just as the sunlight reaches everywhere, the name Ar-Rahman symbolizes the universality of Allah's mercy. Allah generously offers this mercy to all His creatures. In the most challenging moments, when a person prays for relief from their troubles, it is possible for them to turn their gaze towards the essence of this name and alleviate their inner turmoil with this mercy. Sufi practitioners strengthen a profound sense of compassion and tolerance in the believer's heart through the name Ar-Rahman.

In conclusion, the name Ar-Rahman is frequently referred to in the daily lives of Muslims. The propagation of mercy through this name aims to strengthen social bonds and increase tolerance among people. Reciting the name Ar-Rahman spiritually relaxes individuals and leads them to feel more at peace.
fazileti: Reciting the name Ar-Rahman not only enhances a person's spiritual tranquility but also reinforces the understanding of Allah's mercy and generosity in their mind. This name can be frequently recited during difficult times and prayers with the intention of accessing Allah's mercy and cleansing oneself from negative emotions and thoughts deep within the heart.

kisa_anlam: The Compassionate, the Merciful.
detayli_aciklama:
Er-Rahîm symbolizes Allah's boundless mercy and compassion. This name represents an indispensable attribute of Allah regarding the accessibility of the beautiful teachings revealed through revelation to all humanity. It is possible for every individual to attain spiritual peace by benefiting from His mercy. This situation adds a distinct style and depth; for mercy is a power that not only affects a person's spiritual state but also establishes social peace.

This blessed name, frequently mentioned in the Holy Quran, emphasizes themes of forgiveness, pardon, and tolerance. Er-Rahîm holds a significant place in shaping people's attitudes towards one another through Allah's mercy, not only in individual terms but also in social relationships. Our Exalted Lord protects His servants in the best way with His mercy and guides them; this enables individuals to feel free and secure.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Er-Rahîm is like a light that illuminates the darkness in hearts. Understanding Allah's mercy opens the doors to being gentler and more understanding towards His servants. This name inspires people to discover the mercy within themselves and reflect it to those around them; thus, creating an environment of social peace and solidarity.
fazileti: The remembrance of the name Er-Rahîm increases feelings of mercy in a person's heart and helps them to be purified from all kinds of evil. To recite this name with the intention of remembering Allah's mercy and exhibiting a compassionate approach in relationships with others nourishes the person's soul and strengthens their connections with those around them. Additionally, those who recite this name find a strong support in dealing with the challenges in their lives by better understanding Allah's mercy.

kisa_anlam: The Owner, the Sovereign.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Malik symbolizes the majesty and absolute sovereignty of Allah. This name expresses the Exalted Allah, who is the owner of all beings and holds the absolute authority over everything. Allah, who reigns in every corner of the universe and is the creator of all things, reminds us of His power through this name. Everything exists and ceases to exist by His will; this further expands His realm of sovereignty.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Malik evokes a deep sense of respect and submission to Allah in the heart of a person. When a servant recites this name, it increases their gratitude towards His power and divine governance in their heart. Reflecting on the fact that the management of the entire universe belongs to Him reinforces a person's submission and attachment to Allah. The peace and security derived from living under the Creator's sovereignty creates a profound tranquility in the heart.

The manifestations of the name Al-Malik serve as a guide in a person's life. The remembrances made with this name enhance the individual's spiritual depth, providing inner peace and tranquility, while also helping them to feel spiritual freedom. Remembering this name with a state of mind free from all negative emotions ensures that the person is filled with mercy and blessings in both their worldly and afterlife.
fazileti: The greatest benefit of reciting the name Al-Malik is that it helps to distance the desires and whispers of the heart. A person who submits to Allah by mentioning this name reduces their attachment to worldly possessions and temporary benefits. During the remembrance, when contemplating His absolute sovereignty, a sense of relief and peace arises in the person's heart. This name not only increases spiritual tranquility but also serves as a means to bring the individual closer to Allah.

kisa_anlam: The Most Sacred.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Quddūs is a name that expresses Allah's infinite and boundless majesty. This name indicates that Allah is free from any deficiencies, flaws, and faults. His sanctity conveys that He is beyond all beings, far removed from any form of confinement or limitation. Furthermore, the name Al-Quddūs serves as a guide for one's spiritual journey by purifying the soul, steering one away from sins and ill intentions.

This name also symbolizes spiritual cleanliness and purification. The profound meaning of the term Al-Quddūs goes beyond being a unique attribute of Allah; it also signifies the cleansing of the impurities in the hearts and souls of individuals. When a believer recites this name, they are offered an opportunity for spiritual renewal, filling their soul with Allah's divine light. Thus, it facilitates the attainment of inner peace and tranquility.

The name Al-Quddūs also serves as a key to understanding the effects of Allah's majesty and sanctity on life. The remembrances made with this name illuminate the dark points within a person's soul and allow them to confront themselves. As a result, one embarks on a journey to discover their essence and true color, gaining spiritual depth.
fazileti: The recitation of the name Al-Quddūs helps individuals find spiritual and inner peace. Those who recite this name gain the opportunity to feel Allah's sanctity and majesty. One's intention should be to achieve spiritual purification and inner tranquility. At the same time, they can remind their loved ones of this name, allowing them to pray together, so they can be more sensitive and kind in their relationships.

kisa_anlam: The One who grants peace and safety, distancing from all forms of evil.
detayli_aciklama:
Es-Selâm, as one of Allah's names, symbolizes peace, tranquility, and security. This name represents the happiness and well-being that reaches both humans and inanimate beings. The peace that resides over all creations in the universe is a reflection of the manifestation of this name. Remembering the name Es-Selâm is a gateway for Muslims to attain tranquility in their worldly life and the Hereafter. The meanings embedded within this name prepare the ground for strengthening the spiritual bonds that hold people together.

In a Sufi sense, Es-Selâm emphasizes the value of love, respect, and friendship. In the remembrance of this name, when a person wishes peace and tranquility for themselves and those around them, a spiritual purification occurs. Therefore, from a Sufi perspective, Es-Selâm, when mentioned alongside other names, symbolizes the gathering of all beings in a framework of peace and goodness. Allah's safety distances people from evils and makes their lives more meaningful.

In conclusion, the understanding of justice and peace that the name Es-Selâm offers establishes inner peace for individuals while also strengthening social structures. The peace that will not fade from tongues as long as it is remembered with this name allows people to embrace one another with love and approach each other with goodwill. True peace and safety is the most precious gift bestowed upon us by Es-Selâm.
fazileti: The remembrance of the name Es-Selâm brings spiritual and physical tranquility to believers. When reciting this name, the intention is to purify oneself from the troubles that reside in the heart. When a person remembers Es-Selâm, they seek Allah's assistance to overcome the difficulties they encounter in life and to live in peace and security. During the remembrance, heart tranquility and inner enlightenment are achieved, which opens the door to positive changes in an individual's life.

kisa_anlam: The One who believes, the Giver of security.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Mu'min, as one of the names of Allah, expresses His aspect that grants security and tranquility to His servants, instilling faith and trust in their hearts. This name emphasizes Allah's characteristic of being a safe refuge that does not harm anyone. Al-Mu'min also embodies a quality that brings peace to the hearts of believers, enlightens their minds, and leads them from darkness to light.

In the depth of Sufism, the name Al-Mu'min evokes a profound sense of love and attachment in the hearts of the believers. The person who is associated with this name approaches Him with complete trust, seeking Allah's mercy and protection. By distancing themselves from all fears, both material and spiritual, they are filled with the hope of attaining safety in this world and the Hereafter through Al-Mu'min.

Moreover, the manifestation of the name Al-Mu'min contributes to the prevalence of security and tranquility within society. People become more compassionate, understanding, and supportive towards one another, thereby strengthening social bonds. The contributions of this name to the serenity of hearts and the widespread trust make it of great significance in society.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Mu'min increases the trust in Allah within the hearts of the servants and reinforces spiritual tranquility. The remembrance of this name should be done with the intention of seeking Allah's protection and strengthening the bond with Him. The prostrations made during the remembrance bring peace to the heart by directing it solely towards Him and strengthen the ties among the believers.

kisa_anlam: The One who oversees and protects everything, the One who has authority over all.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Muhaymin, as one of the attributes of Allah, is a glorious name that oversees and protects all beings, knows everything best, and possesses absolute authority over all things. This name also expresses that Allah protects from all kinds of dangers, oversees each being, and bestows peace and security upon the hearts of people. In a Sufi sense, Al-Muhaymin is a name that contributes to a person's spiritual and moral development; it reminds the individual to surrender to Allah, trust in Him, and seek His help in every situation.

This name serves as a source of security among believers, as it protects them from all kinds of evil and calamity. By invoking the name Al-Muhaymin, remembering that Allah oversees and protects everything leads the believers to spiritual tranquility and peace. In this context, its manifestations strengthen the guiding quality in people, for when the name Al-Muhaymin is mentioned with awe and respect, a light emerges in the hearts. When a person feels under this divine supervision, they find inner peace and the strength to cope with the challenges of the external world.

Moreover, the manifestations of Al-Muhaymin's attribute guide His servants towards true knowledge and wisdom by purifying their hearts from confusion. From an Islamic perspective, this name is not merely a definition but also a responsibility. When Muslims invoke this name, they remember His protective and caring attribute, feeling secure from all kinds of troubles and distress throughout their lives. Thus, invoking this name enhances the feeling of trust and surrender to Allah.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Muhaymin provides spiritual protection and brings inner peace to a person. Under the influence of this name, an individual strengthens their sense of trust in Allah and finds the strength to entrust all their troubles to Him. Especially reciting this name along with prayers that align with your intentions will reinforce the feeling of being under Allah's supervision and deepen your bond with the Creator.

kisa_anlam: The Unique and Exalted One.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Aziz is referred to as the One who possesses power and majesty, recognized as a being beyond all things due to His exaltation and sovereignty. This name expresses that Allah's authority knows no bounds, and He has complete control and power over everything. For the believers, this name is not only a source of mercy and compassion but also signifies strong protection and support.

This majesty reminds us that alongside all forms of power and authority, Allah possesses an incredible greatness, shaping the spiritual worlds of people. When a Muslim recites the name Al-Aziz, they surrender themselves to the existence of this supreme power and feel protected from all difficulties and calamities. They find peace in their hearts and tranquility in their souls. This name reinforces trust in Allah and encourages individuals to stand firm in the face of challenges.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Aziz is also considered a sign of the exaltation of beings in their most perfect states. Every being is like a mirror reflecting His majesty; each is created with specific power and wisdom. The verses in the Qur'an related to this name contain a deep and broad understanding, akin to a river. Reaching this profound understanding greatly contributes to a person's spiritual journey.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Aziz helps a person feel stronger and more secure. Frequently remembering this name instills an infinite respect and devotion towards Allah in the heart. In difficult times, saying 'Al-Aziz' can lead to relief from the troubles one is experiencing and provide strength. Moreover, those who keep this name in their minds and on their tongues can gain a more respected and beloved personality in the eyes of others.

kisa_anlam: The One who forcibly rectifies everything and brings it to perfection.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Jabbar is presented in the belief of Muslims as an attribute that reshapes everything with His power and repairs what is broken. This name not only addresses the physical realm but also heals the wounds in our spiritual world; it provides spiritual, inner peace, and wholeness. It serves as a source of consolation in the face of human troubles and sorrows. He is known for His mercy and power over His servants; He revives and protects those who seek refuge in Him, far from all forms of coercion.

In situations where this name manifests, individuals find support in overcoming the difficulties of their lives. Al-Jabbar reveals the potential within a person; He offers all kinds of opportunities to those who obey and are patient. With every new beginning, He instills relief and hope in hearts. In Sufism, the remembrance of the name Al-Jabbar elevates a person's low self-esteem while simultaneously enhancing the sense of self-discovery and self-confidence.

Therefore, the name Al-Jabbar is not merely a name but also a means of transformation and purification. It increases a person's consciousness and depth of servitude while offering the opportunity to embark on a spiritual journey. The one who remembers this name finds strength in the face of life's challenges and progresses towards their goals with greater determination.
fazileti: The remembrance of the name Al-Jabbar provides great relief in a person's spiritual world. Reciting this name to escape from troubles and attain inner peace enhances a person's authority and resilience. During the remembrance, having a sincere intention and turning to Allah with this name creates a profound change in the person's soul; thus, it enables them to cope with difficulties more easily and leads to a peaceful life.

kisa_anlam: The Absolute in greatness and exaltation.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Mutakabbir expresses Allah's exaltation, greatness, and His status as a being above all. This name emphasizes that Allah deserves all praise and glorification. Mutakabbir is not a trait of arrogance, but rather a quality of the Almighty Allah who possesses absolute sovereignty and grandeur over all things. As a reflection of His power and wisdom, this name instills deep respect and awe in the hearts of believers.

From a perspective of self-reflection, Al-Mutakabbir encourages individuals to transcend themselves and discipline their egos. This name keeps people away from arrogance and reminds them that true exaltation belongs solely to Allah. By invoking this name in their prayers, believers acknowledge His greatness and majesty. It serves as a guide that eradicates arrogance and self-importance from the hearts, directing individuals towards humility.

The manifestations of Al-Mutakabbir in individuals' lives become evident through the awareness that power and authority belong only to Allah. This awareness enables a person to understand that they should not see themselves as superior to anyone. Since exaltation and grandeur belong solely to Allah, when believers recite this name, it leads them to be in a state of deep humility and strive to act more justly and compassionately in their social relationships.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Mutakabbir instills peace and security in the hearts of believers, enhancing their devotion to Allah. The remembrance of this name serves as a means to purify oneself from worldly arrogance and pride, helping the believer to feel close to Him at all times. Muslims aim to achieve spiritual tranquility by reciting this name to break any negative thoughts, jealousy, and selfishness.

kisa_anlam: The Creator.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Khaliq is a name that represents the foundation of creation and existence. This name of Allah emphasizes His power in the creation of the universe and every living being within it. It expresses that everything is created for a reason, and thus creation is not merely a physical phenomenon but also a spiritual and metaphysical reality that we must acknowledge. In Sufi thought, this name helps an individual recognize a Creator in their spiritual journey and turn towards Him.

The manifestation of the name Al-Khaliq holds great significance in understanding the purpose of human existence and living a life in accordance with that purpose. When people reflect on the name Al-Khaliq, they contemplate the perfection of creation and the interconnectedness of all things. This not only facilitates individual spiritual development but also contributes to the strengthening of social bonds. It reminds us that Allah's creative power is awe-inspiring and that every being is part of a flawless system.

Remembering this name allows a person to consider their connection to a being beyond creation and to recognize that every event in their life has meaning. For a believer who deeply questions the meaning of existence, Al-Khaliq can lead to a reformation of their relationship with the Creator. For nearly six hundred years, this name has been a subject of material and spiritual contemplation, facilitating the peace of the soul through remembrance and reflection within the depths of Islamic thought.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Khaliq strengthens a person's bond with their Creator and helps them grasp the profound meaning of creation. The remembrance of this name, especially in difficult times, provides patience and resilience, and is beneficial for understanding the wisdom in the process of creation. Remembrance is an expression of gratitude for Allah's creative power and trust in Him.

kisa_anlam: The Creator and the One who brings beings into existence from nothing.
detayli_aciklama: Al-Bāri' is a name among the attributes of Allah Ta'ala, meaning 'the Creator'. This name is a manifestation of the supreme power that ensures the perfection of beings in their states and conditions. It guarantees that everything is created in the best manner, thus every being bears witness to His magnificent creation.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Bāri' allows individuals to recognize the beauty and perfect order in their creation. Those who recite this name with intention and a sincere heart become a means for themselves and those around them to attain spiritual peace and harmony.

kisa_anlam: The One Who Shapes and Depicts.
detayli_aciklama:
El-Musavvir, as one of Allah's attributes, signifies the One who shapes and depicts everything. This name symbolizes the aesthetic and harmony in the creation of beings. Allah has created each living being with His wisdom, and every creature has acquired unique characteristics. Although man is created in the most beautiful form, he is the being in whom the most perfect depiction manifests through his soul and intellect.

Perception is the ability to perceive something as it is and to attribute meaning to it. El-Musavvir reminds us of the miracle of creation, allowing us to see His power in every detail of our lives. The colors of a flower, the appearance of a mountain, and the personality of a person all emerge as works crafted by El-Musavvir. This name also manifests as Allah's artistry in the depths of the universe.

In a Sufi sense, El-Musavvir serves as a source of inspiration for individuals to discover their potential within and to shape it in the most beautiful way. Every person should aim to be a creative artist in their life by learning from this attribute of His. In this process, where thoughts, emotions, and spiritual states are shaped, those who act with faith and will find themselves under the dominion of El-Musavvir.
fazileti: Reciting the name El-Musavvir enhances a person's creative potential and nourishes their spiritual depth. Reading this name for something to take shape correctly and beautifully creates positive effects in both spiritual and physical realms. Remembrance allows individuals to find peace within themselves while contributing to the healing of fragile emotional states and the enhancement of self-confidence.

kisa_anlam: The Forgiver, the Most Forgiving.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Ghaffār is one of the attributes of Allah, signifying the forgiveness and pardon of sinful servants. This name embodies the vastness of the Most High Allah's mercy and the infinity of His compassion. In Islamic thought, the name Al-Ghaffār inspires those who have sinned to repeatedly repent and hope for forgiveness. With this attribute that expresses Allah's mercy towards His servants, He aims to purify their souls and grant them tranquility.

In a Sufi context, the name Al-Ghaffār holds significant importance in an individual's spiritual development. The remembrances (dhikr) performed with this name purify the heart and facilitate spiritual depth. During the remembrance, a person's forgiveness towards themselves and others increases, thus fostering a sense of spiritual calmness and peace. When invoked, a special connection is formed; momentary mistakes and past heartaches are erased by the mercy of Al-Ghaffār.

The name Al-Ghaffār serves as a powerful tool to eliminate hopelessness and despair within the servants. By invoking this name, one turns towards a God who bestows grace and forgiveness. This intense remembrance enhances sincerity towards Allah and seeks ways to purify from sins. Ultimately, the manifestations of Al-Ghaffār offer a sharp spiritual enlightenment and a life lived in peace, enabling one to coexist harmoniously with themselves and their surroundings.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Ghaffār purifies the soul, instilling feelings of forgiveness and compassion. The repetition of this name should be done especially to cleanse from sins, learn from mistakes, and avoid falling again. As one's closeness to Allah increases, their spiritual tranquility deepens. Thus, one takes a step towards making their life more meaningful and positive.

kisa_anlam: The Absolute Possessor of Power over all things.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Qahhar symbolizes a power and authority that transcends the limits of Allah's might. This name carries a meaning that expresses the authority to guide every being in every stage of creation as He wills. In Islamic thought, the manifestation of the name Al-Qahhar is considered a reflection of power and authority that can be seen in both the balance of nature and social life. This power establishes an order where justice prevails, eliminating oppression and injustice. 

In Sufi terminology, Al-Qahhar expresses the absolute will of Allah, the sole possessor of all authority. This name encourages inner empowerment, self-discipline, and submission to the divine will. When believers exalt the name Al-Qahhar in their hearts, they transcend their own egos and attain the consciousness of being a part of divine power. This awareness is an important step for both spiritual and individual development. 

Finally, the manifestation of the name Al-Qahhar teaches people to be patient in times of pain and difficulty and to place their trust in Allah. Turning to Al-Qahhar in every trouble and hardship, remembering Him, empowers individuals. Finding peace by submitting to the will of something greater than oneself plays a significant role in grasping the true meaning of life. This name instills a deep sense of respect and devotion not only in the reader but also towards all of creation.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Qahhar reminds the individual that power and authority should be sought solely from Allah. Regularly reading this name increases one's spiritual accumulation, enables steadfastness in the face of difficulties, and deepens the soul. Additionally, prayers made with the intention of this name provide great benefit in discovering Allah's power and justice and enhancing the ability to cope with life's challenges.

kisa_anlam: The Bestower, the Giver, the Generous.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Wahhab is a name that emphasizes Allah's grace and bounty. This name signifies the source of numerous gifts and bestowals, both materially and spiritually. According to Islamic belief, Allah, by the name Al-Wahhab, bestows unlimited gifts upon His servants and meets their needs. When a person remembers this name, they recall Allah's infinite mercy and generosity.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Wahhab creates a sense of peace and security in the heart. With the manifestations of this name, believers experience spiritual tranquility and a sense of fulfillment. In the midst of life's challenges and difficulties, by invoking this name, they nurture hope for relief from their troubles and attaining peace through Allah's forgiving and generous attributes. Thus, the name Al-Wahhab has found a place in the hearts of spiritual guides and Sufi practitioners, becoming a frequently recited name.

In the Holy Quran, Allah's attribute is frequently emphasized. Al-Wahhab, with His love for His servants, His passion for meeting their needs, and His boundless forgiveness, serves as a source for individuals to cope with the problems they face. Moreover, the manifestations of this name contribute not only to individuals but also to the formation of a consciousness of peace and mutual assistance at the societal level; thus, the repetition of this name fosters a spirit of community and solidarity.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Wahhab directs a person's heart towards Allah and increases their love for Him. A person who recites this name in search of forgiveness and grace in times of distress believes they will find generosity and peace. Additionally, the recitation of the name Al-Wahhab contributes to the development of a culture of social assistance and understanding of love. It is often expressed that such recitations, performed with this intention, will provide the individual with spiritual fulfillment and inner strength.

kisa_anlam: The Provider, the One who fulfills all needs.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Er-Rezzâk expresses Allah's attribute of providing sustenance. This name encompasses not only material sustenance but also spiritual and emotional nourishment. Through the manifestation of this name, individuals find access to all the resources they need in their lives, thereby securing both their physical and spiritual peace.

According to Islamic teachings, Allah holds every living being responsible for sending their sustenance and creates various means to provide this sustenance. With the understanding that sustenance is not solely comprised of material elements, spiritual components such as knowledge, wisdom, love, and faith are also considered manifestations of the name Er-Rezzâk. Thus, by invoking this name, a person reaches Allah's assistance and the sustenance they require in every aspect of their life.

In a mystical sense, the name Er-Rezzâk enhances feelings of trust and reliance in a person's heart. Individuals who act with the awareness that sustenance comes from Allah find tranquility in the challenges they face in life and achieve spiritual serenity. By trusting in Allah and reciting this name, they become assured that sustenance will come at every moment, providing them with inner peace.
fazileti: Reciting the name Er-Rezzâk alleviates a person's worries regarding sustenance and instills a sense of trust in their heart. Prayers made with this name, when read with the intention of seeking sustenance and blessings from Allah, lead to an increase in blessings in a person's life and facilitate the attainment of both material and spiritual peace. Believers, by reciting this name, hope to gain righteous earnings and the increase of their sustenance.

kisa_anlam: The Opener, the One who opens doors, the One who brings forth goodness.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Fattah, as a name of Allah, carries the meaning of the termination of all kinds of difficulties and the opening of everything that is closed. In the literature of Sufism, this name gains a profound dimension in the sense of the removal of all spiritual and material obstacles. To invoke the name Al-Fattah for the resolution of the darkness in one's heart and the knots in one's mind is interpreted as a form of turning towards Him and seeking help.

In the Sufi journey, invoking the name Al-Fattah should not only be for the purpose of achieving material gains but also for obtaining spiritual openings and broadening one's spiritual horizons. The person who prays with this name is promised that every door will be opened to them, their difficulties will be overcome, and goodness will reach them. Expressing the manifestation of this attribute along with faith can yield satisfying results on both individual and societal levels.

Another meaning of Al-Fattah is the gradual revelation of matters based on Allah's wisdom over time. This name reinforces the belief that a person, by being patient and striving, has passed through a door and that after every constriction, there will come an expansion. Thus, Al-Fattah is not just an attribute but also a source of consolation and hope; it is a light of belief that there is a new beginning behind every door.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Fattah provides hope that the closed paths will be opened, increasing the individual's patience in the face of difficulties. The one who recites this name strengthens their will to escape from the troubles and hardships in their life by praying to Allah to open the doors that have been closed. Additionally, invoking Al-Fattah brings peace and tranquility to the person's heart in a spiritual sense.

kisa_anlam: The All-Knowing.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-‘Alīm is one of the names of Allah, the All-Knowing, who knows the essence of everything, its finest details, and its deepest secrets. This name signifies not only the existence of knowledge but also that this knowledge is intertwined with power and wisdom. Allah encompasses everything with His knowledge, transcending time and space; this demonstrates His greatness and uniqueness to us.

In Sufism, the name Al-‘Alīm serves as a guide that satisfies the thirst for knowledge of His servants. The person who is associated with this name feels a profound encouragement in the pursuit of dedicating themselves to knowledge, learning, and maturation. On the other hand, Al-‘Alīm helps us understand that knowledge is designed by Allah, the Absolute Power, shaped by His will and wisdom, beyond mere information. This deep understanding brings us closer to Allah, the ultimate source of all knowledge and wisdom.

The name Al-‘Alīm guides individuals in many areas of life; it contributes to our becoming civilized individuals in life, and helps us to be more conscious in our social relationships and moral behaviors. This knowledge does not remain merely theoretical; it becomes a light that heals and transforms individuals in practice. Thinking of Al-‘Alīm and turning towards Him assists us in finding the right answers and allows us to grasp the meaning of life more clearly.
fazileti: There are many benefits to reciting the name Al-‘Alīm. This name increases our love for knowledge and strengthens our desire to learn. During the remembrance, recalling that Allah knows everything serves as an important source of motivation for a person to develop themselves and learn from their mistakes. Reciting this name also helps us to better understand events, find inner tranquility, and achieve peace. Mentioning this name with any intention reinforces the respect and love for Allah's knowledge.

kisa_anlam: The One who constricts the sustenance of people due to their knowledge.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Qabid is a name that symbolizes Allah's power over granting and withholding sustenance. The term 'Qabid' means to constrict, to narrow, or to take away. This name serves as a reminder that the increase or decrease of sustenance is solely in the hands of Allah, while revealing the effects of divine will in human life. Many individuals facing economic fluctuations, social challenges, and material hardships feel the manifestation of the name Al-Qabid and recognize these circumstances as a divine test.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Qabid creates a depth in a person's inner world. The individual who is constricted both materially and spiritually embarks on an inner journey, thus seeking true wealth and tranquility. The reality that 'after hardship comes ease' aligns with the symbolism of this name. The challenges that accompany Al-Qabid are, in fact, steps towards the spiritual maturation of the individual.

In conclusion, the name Al-Qabid reminds a person that when faced with all kinds of difficulties and constraints, they must overcome these situations with patience and faith. As one feels the manifestation of this name in their heart, they understand the value of patience and reliance on Allah; they learn the lessons necessary for growth both materially and spiritually. Al-Qabid, in this regard, guides the individual towards a deeper understanding and peace.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Qabid creates awareness regarding sustenance and blessings. It helps a person to be patient in the face of scarcity and reminds them that sustenance is solely in the hands of Allah. Those who recite this name learn to maintain hope even in difficult times and to continue their path with confidence. When this name is mentioned with intention and mindfulness, with the aim of blessings and abundance, it increases the hope of encountering Allah's infinite mercy and grace.

kisa_anlam: The Expander, The Enlarger.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Basit signifies expansion and proliferation. This name of Allah, the Exalted, conveys the meaning of beautifully and appropriately expanding and giving life to everything that has been created. As the Expander, His power and authority contribute to the development and existence of all beings within the universe under His control, highlighting His role as the source of life. This name also carries the authority to inspire and bless people directly.

Another significant aspect of this name lies in its spiritual depth. The name Al-Basit touches upon the emotional state of individuals, creating expansion, tolerance, and understanding in their minds and hearts. It refreshes the heart, opens thoughts, and generally broadens living spaces. At the same time, this name opens the doors to material and spiritual abundance and prosperity for people. The repetition of this name during dhikr establishes a connection with the Essence, with the intention of positively influencing the mental and spiritual state.

Finally, when examined from a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Basit serves as a reminder of the expansion of everything in an environment of hesitation and jealousy. It teaches us to embrace the potential and successes of others, allowing us to open up to a larger space. This name is also a source of consolation and hope; for it reminds us that after every difficulty, a wide space can open up, and even the darkest moments will come to an end.
fazileti: The recitation of the name Al-Basit creates a sense of relief, tranquility, and expansion in the heart of the individual. During dhikr, this name can be recited with the intention of increasing blessings and creating an expansive effect in various areas of life. Thus, the person's soul will find peace, and they will have the opportunity to experience material and spiritual wealth. The intention behind the dhikr is to send forth these expanding waves of energy and love to both oneself and the surrounding environment.

kisa_anlam: The Preserver, the Guardian.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Hafidh signifies Allah's protection and guardianship over His servants from all forms of danger. By invoking the name Al-Hafidh, one beseeches Allah to safeguard oneself and one's loved ones. This name instills a sense of security within the soul, for the Almighty Allah promises protection from all perils. Those who recite this name feel that they are under Allah's guardianship and continue their lives with this assurance.

From a Sufi perspective, Al-Hafidh delves into the depths of the soul and heart, facilitating inner peace for individuals. Allah's guardianship is not limited to material dangers; in spiritual distress, the name Al-Hafidh alleviates despair and instills hope within a person. This, in turn, strengthens people's faith in Allah and opens new panoramas in their spiritual depths.

When individuals face various challenges and hardships in life, the recitation of the name Al-Hafidh offers them a spiritual refuge. This name dispels fears in hearts and helps individuals entrust their anxieties and worries to Allah. Al-Hafidh not only provides individual protection but also establishes social unity and integrity. For hearts united under Allah's guardianship find it easier to overcome difficulties.
fazileti: There are numerous benefits to reciting the name Al-Hafidh. By invoking this name, one seeks both worldly and spiritual protection. Reciting Al-Hafidh is highly effective for dispelling fears and anxieties, enhancing feelings of peace and security. When reciting this name, the individual's intention should be to seek Allah's protection not only for themselves but also for their loved ones. When frequently recited, it strengthens one's spiritual state and provides inner tranquility.

kisa_anlam: The Exalter, the One who elevates status.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Er-Râfi is a manifestation of the mercy and grace of Almighty Allah towards His creations, elevating them both spiritually and materially, granting them status and value. When called upon by this name, Allah alleviates the troubles of His servants, dispels their sorrows, and bestows upon them goodness from unexpected avenues. A person, purifying themselves from all doubts and fears, opens themselves to elevation and growth; this is a reflection of their submission and trust in their Creator.

In a Sufi sense, Er-Râfi symbolizes the spiritual ascent of an individual. Spiritual progress is achieved when a person cleanses the stones in their heart and purifies their soul to reach a higher level of consciousness. Through the manifestation of this name, Allah illuminates the darkness within a person's soul and grants them inner peace. The one who reflects upon Allah's remembrance, by internalizing the profound meanings of this name, spiritually elevates themselves and becomes closer to Allah.

Those who adopt the name Er-Râfi demonstrate patience in all difficulties and place their trust in Allah. As they find inner strength, they possess the ability to overcome the challenges they face. The servants who are associated with this name are always recipients of Allah's mercy and grace; they find elevation, bounty, and blessings in both this world and the Hereafter. This reveals that the name Er-Râfi is not merely a collection of words, but signifies a deep value in our culture.
fazileti: The remembrance of the name Er-Râfi provides a person with spiritual elevation, alleviates their troubles, and brings tranquility to their soul. Those who mention this name strengthen their bond with Allah and find relief in their difficulties by turning towards Him. Especially the remembrance performed on Fridays, each word included in their prayers opens the doors to their Lord's grace and mercy.

kisa_anlam: The One Who Bestows Honor and Dignity.
detayli_aciklama:
El-Mu'ız is one of the attributes of the Almighty Allah, meaning the One who grants honor, dignity, and status to people. This name carries significant meaning in the context of Allah's various ways of honoring His servants, granting them strength and prestige. The Creator of all things, Allah, bestows glory and honor upon whom He wills, while He can also take away these attributes from whom He wills. This indicates the absolute nature of Divine will and the helplessness of humanity in the face of this will.

In this universe, where manifestations are multilayered, being aware of the honor bestowed upon oneself imposes a responsibility towards Allah. The name El-Mu'ız serves as a constant reminder for an individual's spiritual elevation and respectability in social life. By invoking this name, a person finds inner strength and feels more affluent. By acknowledging that honor and dignity come from Allah, a person secures a more meaningful place in life.

From a Sufi perspective, El-Mu'ız is a name that helps in the purification of the soul, elevating the spirit, and drawing closer to Allah. When a person recites this name, it not only facilitates an increase in their sense of honor and dignity but also positively impacts those around them. The remembrance associated with this name becomes a source of strength in the spiritual struggle of the servants, bringing tranquility and peace to the soul.
fazileti: Reciting the name El-Mu'ız helps a person feel spiritually enriched, gain respect in social life, and attain a high level of prestige. The intention behind this name is to seek honor and dignity from Allah, to request spiritual elevation, and to desire that others treat them with this honor. When the remembrance is performed with the heart and intention, it provides a deep sense of relief and security to the human soul.

kisa_anlam: The Diminisher, The Humiliator.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Mudhill signifies the act of humiliating and belittling. This name serves as a reminder of how Allah's power and authority dominate everything. Granting honor or degrading His servants is solely in His hands. Humanity must not forget that bestowing respect upon someone or bringing them low is subject to the will of the Most High, and only He desires it.

In Sufi literature, the name Al-Mudhill holds significant importance in the path of disciplining one's ego and self. When a person recites this name of Allah, they are inclined to feel more helpless and in need. It also aids in understanding that they should exhibit greater humility within society. The profound meanings that descend into the heart of a person with the name Al-Mudhill equip them with a more humble and loving understanding towards others.

Al-Mudhill also expresses the weakness of those who do not walk the right path and those who are arrogant. This name creates an awakening in the heart of a person and prompts them to question themselves. While people sometimes chase after honor or reputation, when they deeply contemplate the meaning of the name Al-Mudhill, they realize that their true moral values lie in turning inward and that seeking Allah's pleasure is above all else.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Mudhill helps a person recognize their own self and distance themselves from arrogance and pride. The reading of this name enhances feelings of humility and helplessness, providing spiritual relief. Particularly, reciting this name on Friday facilitates the servants' closeness to Allah and helps them find inner peace. When recited with the intention of seeking goodness from Allah and accepting one's shortcomings, a significant divine transformation occurs within the person's soul.

kisa_anlam: The All-Hearing.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Sami signifies the attribute of the Most High Allah in hearing the voices of all things, the whispered thoughts, and the states of the heart. This name is perceived as a guarantee that the supplications and prayers of the servant are heard by Allah; for He possesses the power to hear the most hidden and the most apparent, all forms of sound and speech. When a person turns towards the manifestation of the name Al-Sami, they open not only their expressions but also their inner world to Him. This situation creates a profound sense of peace and security. 

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Sami carries a meaning that enhances human affection for one another and strengthens the feeling of solidarity. For knowing that Allah hears every voice spreads compassion and understanding in the hearts of people. This builds a sense of humanity and brotherhood in society, elevating individuals to a deeper level of empathy. The power of the Most High Allah, who is associated with this name, reminds the servant that they are not left alone, but that He is with them in every moment and in all their states.

Ultimately, the name Al-Sami reinforces our faith in Allah and illuminates the spiritual depth of the individual. It helps us realize that we are not alone in any situation, and that at the moment we kneel in supplication, there is a Most Exalted Listener present with us. Al-Sami offers the individual the opportunity to turn towards their inner world; thus, we rise spiritually and deepen in a spiritual sense.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Sami aids in finding inner peace, alleviating troubles, and deepening spiritually. When we recite this name with the belief that Allah hears every word and supplication, it not only brings tranquility to our hearts but also instills a sense of inner security and peace. The recitations made with the name Al-Sami are highly beneficial for purification from sins, increasing insight towards the solutions of our problems, and establishing a deep sense of compassion in a spiritual sense.

kisa_anlam: The All-Seeing.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Basir is regarded as one of the names of Allah that can perceive the true essence of everything beyond what is visible. This name represents a perspective that encompasses not only the external appearances but also the intentions and feelings that lie deep within the heart. This perspective, a grace bestowed upon the servants, aids the believers in recognizing the truths not only in the physical world but also in their spiritual lives.

In a Sufi sense, Al-Basir signifies the enlightenment of the soul and an inner intuition. When an individual recites this name, they seek refuge in Allah to illuminate the darkness within their soul and to be guided towards the right path. Being guided by the mercy of Al-Basir in the realm of the unseen and the lost is crucial for a person in finding themselves. Allah knows the deepest secrets of every individual and offers guidance suited to them.

Moreover, Al-Basir plays a significant role in ensuring justice and fairness in social relations. People should act with a profound understanding rather than a superficial perspective, being able to see the needs, pains, and joys of others. In this context, the name Al-Basir provides individuals with the opportunity to understand one another and to better comprehend the order created by Allah.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Basir helps a person find inner peace and evaluate events more accurately. Reading this name during troubled times, when feeling indecisive, or when struggling to find direction becomes a form of spiritual light for the individual. When recited with intention, Allah's all-seeing nature and intervention instill comfort and security in the hearts of the servants.

kisa_anlam: The Absolute Judge of all things.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Hakam expresses Allah's attribute of judging with justice, providing the most accurate and appropriate outcome in every situation. This name emphasizes that all judgments belong to Allah and guides people to make correct decisions with their own will. Allah, with the attribute of Al-Hakam, establishes justice among beings; He safeguards everyone's rights and creates a balance against all forms of oppression.

In Sufi literature, Al-Hakam symbolizes the justice within a person's inner world. A person who disciplines their own self and protects their essence against injustices experiences the manifestation of the attribute of Al-Hakam. In this context, Al-Hakam plays an important role not only in the law of the external world but also in ensuring the inner peace and justice of the individual. When a person recites the name Al-Hakam, they seek to eliminate their inner unrest, illuminate the dark points of their heart, and achieve spiritual balance.

Another important aspect of Al-Hakam is to bring order to the social structure. In establishing justice within society, Allah's attribute of Al-Hakam emerges as a reference in the relationships between people. Islam encourages a deep understanding of the meaning of the name Al-Hakam concerning social justice and requires its application. This name directs believers to represent justice at both individual and societal levels and to establish a balance within moral and legal frameworks.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Hakam leads to an increase in justice, balance, and wisdom. A person who frequently mentions this name finds peace and tranquility in their spiritual structure and develops a just perspective in their surroundings. While mentioning this name during dhikr, asking Allah for the ability to make decisions with wisdom and justice reminds individuals of their responsibilities towards themselves and their environment. This name also helps the individual maintain the balance between intellect and heart.

kisa_anlam: The Just, the One who places everything in its rightful place.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Adl is a name that expresses Allah's justice. This name emphasizes Allah's attribute of being correct and just in all matters. In the face of injustices and unfairness that people encounter, the name Al-Adl provides comfort to the minds of believers and brings peace to their hearts. In Islamic belief, justice is regarded as a virtue that should be upheld not only among humans but also among all beings. This name is a powerful reflection of Allah's justice; it shows that everything is created in its rightful place and appropriately.

Secondly, the name Al-Adl encourages servants to develop their understanding of justice in their own lives. When a Muslim associates their life with this name, they strive to create a perfect balance. Justice is the foundation of social relations and one of the most important moral values that a person possesses. This name serves as a call for social justice and the protection of human rights.

Finally, the name Al-Adl acts as a means to establish justice and equality among servants. It is a source of inspiration for people to learn how to behave towards others. This name, with its deep belief in Allah's justice, purifies the heart of the individual and guides them on their path to self-improvement. Al-Adl directs people to be careful in their relationships, to avoid injustice, and to be kind to others.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Adl reinforces the sense of justice in a person and cultivates sensitivity towards injustices. The most significant benefit this name offers to the reader is the increase in peace within their hearts. The remembrances made with the name Al-Adl help a person make correct decisions and assist them in leading a just life for themselves and their surroundings. Furthermore, when this name is recited with the intention of establishing justice in society, it plays a significant role in the individual's spiritual journey.

kisa_anlam: The One who is gentle and possesses subtle mercy.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Latīf is one of the beautiful names of Allah, and this name expresses His subtle mercy, gentle workings, and hidden favors. The manifestation of this name reminds us that behind every difficulty we encounter in life, there are hidden blessings and assistance from Allah. When a believer recites the name Al-Latīf, they become aware of these favors and dispel the clouds of despair in their soul.

Al-Latīf declares that Allah, the Exalted, possesses subtle gentleness and unseen beautiful plans in everything His servants need. His love and compassion for His servants are so profound that He demonstrates the generosity of offering each one what is most suitable, beautiful, and beneficial. This name also purifies the heart and soul of a person, developing a sharp perspective and helping them understand the divine wisdom behind everything in the world.

This name, which requires surrender rather than rebellion, symbolizes the subtle changes and spiritual journeys within the depths of the soul. Reciting the name Al-Latīf serves as a means to draw closer to His love and grace. This guiding name elevates a person to the highest ranks of patience, love, and compassion, enabling them to experience the most profound emotional experiences spiritually.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Latīf increases a person's faith in Allah's mercy in their heart, helps them remain patient during difficult days, and when recited with the intention of being freed from material and spiritual troubles, it provides spiritual tranquility and inner happiness. Additionally, it reinforces the awareness of being gentle and compassionate towards others, which strengthens social relationships and fortifies the bonds of love in hearts.

kisa_anlam: The All-Aware.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Habir is a manifestation of Allah's infinite knowledge and wisdom. This name symbolizes the power of Allah, who is aware of every detail of everything. He knows the thoughts, intentions, and feelings that people conceal within themselves; He possesses an understanding that transcends the visible. This serves as guidance for the believers to question not only the external world but also their inner states.

In Sufism, the name Al-Habir delves into the depths of hearts, confronting individuals with their own inner realities. By invoking this name, one should remember that their Lord is always with them and that they should seek refuge in Him, especially during difficult times. This encourages individuals to lead a more attentive and conscious life. Every individual, through Allah's attribute of Al-Habir, seeks His presence as a means of self-awareness and understanding.

The manifestations of the name Al-Habir enhance the deep understanding and intuition within the human soul. This enables believers to draw closer to Allah, creating a sense of peace and security in their hearts. Furthermore, the meaning of this name directs individuals to be more compassionate and understanding towards the hidden states of others. By remembering this name, a person can grasp the significance of every moment in their life and the reality that Allah knows every detail.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Habir grants a person profound meaning, patience, and the ability to humble oneself. While invoking this name, individuals should purify their intentions, aim to draw closer to Allah, and seek inner peace. Through remembrance, the heart is fortified with the awareness that the Lord is cognizant of everything, enabling one to remain steadfast against the challenges of life.

kisa_anlam: Patient and forgiving in the face of aggression.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Halīm is a name that embodies the patience and forgiveness of the Exalted Allah. This name symbolizes the tolerance shown by the Exalted Allah towards all kinds of mistakes and sins of humanity. Despite His power, He overlooks weaknesses and forgives, thereby creating an environment of balance and peace among His servants.

The manifestation of this name instills patience and resilience in a person's life. It teaches one to stand firm against difficulties encountered in tough times and to be forgiving. The name Al-Halīm helps us understand Allah's mercy and compassion, enabling His servants to be more tolerant towards each other and contributing to societal peace.

In Sufi teachings, the mention of the name Al-Halīm aids in elevating the spiritual level and helps individuals feel more at peace. Muslims should take the patience and forgiveness of the Exalted Allah as an example by reciting this name and strive to exhibit these qualities in their daily lives.
fazileti: The recitation of the name Al-Halīm creates deep tranquility and serenity in the hearts. Believers who remember patience, forgiveness, and tolerance while mentioning this name reflect these qualities in their daily lives to strengthen feelings of peace and brotherhood in society. Thus, people are inclined to be patient in their lives and to exhibit a more affectionate and tolerant attitude towards one another.

kisa_anlam: The One who possesses greatness and majesty.
detayli_aciklama:
El-Azîm is a name that expresses exaltation and greatness. The majesty of Allah is a power that all beings stand in respect and admiration before. This name symbolizes His unique exaltation and the divinity that is above all things. In this context, El-Azîm not only expresses the greatness of creation but also the depth of our Lord's power and wisdom.

From a Sufi perspective, the name El-Azîm forms the foundation of a lifestyle that connects the servant to their Lord. When people feel the manifestation of the name El-Azîm, they may feel weak and powerless, yet they also realize they are surrounded by immense strength and majesty. This creates a spiritual elevation and deep submission for a believer. It is a state where the consciousness of servitude is illuminated, relieved, and reaches tranquility.

El-Azîm is a sign of the exalted attributes of Allah finding a place in our chests, hearts, and lives. When a person recites this name, they not only remember Allah's majesty but also question the essence of their own creation and existence. Thus, they delve into thoughts so profound that they will not look back again in the presence of the Lord who owns the Throne, and they make sense of this life with the effects of His greatness created within them.
fazileti: Reciting the name El-Azîm brings great tranquility and peace to the human soul. The repetition of this name adds spiritual strength to the individual, enhancing their ability to cope with difficulties and challenges. During the remembrance, the person's closeness to Allah increases, and feeling His majesty leads them to a deeper awareness of servitude. It is believed that the prayers and remembrances made with this name will be accepted by the Exalted Allah.

kisa_anlam: The Forgiving
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Ghafūr is a name that expresses Allah's infinite forgiveness. This name conveys the power to forgive the mistakes of His servants and recreate them anew. In Islamic belief, Allah's mercy precedes everything, and this mercy manifests through His attribute of Ghafūr. Despite the sins of His servants, He offers them hope and always keeps the door of forgiveness open.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Ghafūr reminds individuals of the necessity of repentance. Every person can make mistakes; however, instead of being crushed under the weight of these errors, seeking refuge in the mercy of Al-Ghafūr is a source of relief and tranquility for every servant. Believing and reciting the name Al-Ghafūr calms the hearts and purifies the souls. This structure disperses the darkness in the heart and serves to purify the hearts of the servants.

Moreover, the name Al-Ghafūr, by reminding of Allah's forgiving nature, guides people to be forgiving towards one another. It aims to reduce hatred and animosity in our societies while increasing love and tolerance. This name is a reflection of Allah's love and mercy towards humanity, created with the desire to continuously forgive His servants. Living with this awareness enhances individuals spiritually and contributes to social peace.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Ghafūr serves as a means to feel Allah's limitless forgiveness. The mention of this name increases the feeling of remorse in the hearts of the servants, encouraging them to engage in more repentance and seeking forgiveness. Additionally, the frequent mention of this name purifies the spirit and aids in spiritual elevation. As the name Al-Ghafūr promotes forgiveness, it also contributes to the increase of reconciliation and peace in interpersonal relationships.

kisa_anlam: He who loves to be grateful and to express thanks.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Shakur is one of the most beautiful names of Allah and expresses the gratitude and thankfulness that a servant feels towards Him. This name serves as a reminder that every created being owes a debt of gratitude to Allah in some way; for He expects His servant to feel grateful for the blessings while fulfilling every need of theirs. According to Islamic understanding, Al-Shakur emphasizes that a person should not only accept the blessings but also genuinely feel gratitude in their heart for these blessings.

At the same time, the manifestation of the name Al-Shakur carries profound meanings related to the servant's patience and the act of being grateful even in the face of difficulties. Allah promises that He will reward the grateful servant with even more blessings. This is a reality supported by verses: "If you are grateful, I will surely increase your favor upon you." (Ibrahim, 7). In this context, Al-Shakur becomes a symbol that encompasses patience, reliance, and gratitude.

In Sufi thought, Al-Shakur is essential for a person to attain spiritual maturity. True gratitude is not merely a verbal expression but also a state of the heart. The servant should demonstrate their love and gratitude towards Allah through worship and prayers. Thus, Al-Shakur is a title that nourishes the soul and elevates one spiritually.
fazileti: The remembrance of the name Al-Shakur enhances the feeling of gratitude in a person's heart, allowing them to appreciate the blessings of this world more and also providing spiritual depth. During the remembrance, the person's intention should be to express gratitude for every blessing encountered and to strengthen their bond with their Lord. Through this, they find spiritual peace and discover the path to valuing every moment of life.

kisa_anlam: It means Exalted, Possessor of Majesty.
detayli_aciklama:
The name El-Aliyy carries meanings of being Exalted and occupying the highest rank. In the essence of Islam, this name, which is among the attributes of Allah, expresses that He is above all things and that His power surpasses the limits of everything. When people contemplate the profound meaning of this name, they find spiritual tranquility and carry the belief that they too can achieve lofty goals.

In the literature of Sufism, the name El-Aliyy has become a symbol of a person's spiritual ascent. When this name, which settles in the heart, is sincerely recited, it serves as a ladder that can lead a person to happiness in both this world and the Hereafter. The mention of this name elevates individuals not only physically but also spiritually. As each person comprehends the meaning of the name El-Aliyy, they embark on a journey towards their higher ranks, understanding the importance of knowing their limits and showing humility.

The manifestation of the name El-Aliyy is evident in various aspects of life. In moments where virtues such as mercy, forgiveness, and tolerance are displayed, a person who recites this name truly becomes exalted. By finding their inner peace, they also spread this tranquility to those around them. The divine power granted to humans creates a balance and harmony; thus, living within a life that embodies the meaning of El-Aliyy becomes possible.
fazileti: Reciting the name El-Aliyy facilitates a person's spiritual and moral elevation. A person who recites this name with the intention of overcoming all difficulties and feeling closer to Allah becomes spiritually empowered. Additionally, the name El-Aliyy increases a person's self-belief and encourages them to set high goals.

kisa_anlam: The Great, the Exalted, the Possessor of Majesty.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Kabir is one of the fundamental attributes that express Allah's exaltation and greatness. This name symbolizes the divine majesty that transcends everything and reminds humanity of its own helplessness. In our religion, it is accepted that all aspects of greatness belong to Allah, and there is a belief that all beings are rendered powerless in the face of His greatness.

In Sufism, the name Al-Kabir is seen as an important station in the spiritual journeys of the Sufis. A person who knows Allah's greatness distances themselves from arrogance and pride; for when they compare themselves to Allah, the source of greatness and exaltation, they realize how insignificant their own existence is. This name serves as a guide in spiritual maturation, self-discipline, and resisting the desires of the ego.

Moreover, the manifestations of the name Al-Kabir are evident to humans in both the material and spiritual realms. Understanding that every greatness, majesty, and power belongs to Allah adds profound meaning to an individual's life and helps them overcome the challenges they face. Remembering Allah's greatness brings peace and gratitude to the heart, directing the individual away from worldly concerns towards a sublime tranquility.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Kabir helps a person realize the futility of boasting about their own greatness, discipline their ego, and deepen their servitude to Allah. By invoking this name, a believer who recognizes that greatness solely belongs to Allah acts with humility and modesty in their life. When recited with the intention of alleviating distress, increasing hope, and fostering patience, it leads the believer to attain spiritual tranquility.

kisa_anlam: The Preserver, The Guardian.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Hafiz is a name that reflects Allah's vast attribute of protection and guardianship. This name emphasizes that Allah is a protector over all things and that those who seek refuge in Him will be safe from all kinds of dangers. His guardianship is felt in every moment of the universe, in every living being, and in every object, illuminating the lives of believers like a sun that brings comfort to their souls.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Hafiz reinforces a sense of peace and security in the hearts of the believers. Mentioning this name during dhikr and contemplation increases a person's trust in Allah and reminds them that they are under His protection. Seeing this name during dhikr directs our attention to His sovereignty over all things and His mercy towards us.

Moreover, Al-Hafiz provides great support in our quest for protection from all negativity in our religious and spiritual lives. This name emerges as a force that instills a sublime excitement and fervor of faith in the hearts of the servants, keeping them always on the right path. Allah's name is not just a name but also a source of security.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Hafiz instills confidence and tranquility in a person. In every moment of this name, seeking refuge in Allah's protection and turning towards His mercy should be done with this intention during dhikr. Mentioning this name with respect and sincerity creates a secure foundation in a person's life and enhances spiritual peace.

kisa_anlam: The Sustainer of all things.
detayli_aciklama:
El-Mukît, as one of the names of Allah, signifies His absolute power over the sustenance and protection of all creations. This name stands out as a divine means that ensures the fulfillment of both spiritual and physical needs of beings in the most suitable and correct manner. Knowing that He holds every blessing, sustenance, and strength necessary for a person to sustain their existence at every moment of life serves as a great source of comfort for the believers.

From a Sufi perspective, the name El-Mukît also offers significant insights regarding spiritual nourishment for individuals. The nourishment of the heart and soul is achievable not only through physical sustenance but also by turning towards Allah and surrendering to Him. This name facilitates a person's connection with their spiritual depths and helps them find inner peace. A believer who begins to experience the manifestations of this name over time distances themselves from all kinds of worries in their heart and fills their soul with divine light.

El-Mukît also carries a dimension of protection and sustenance for all beings, especially for humanity. In the face of the world's complexities and challenging events, this name grants patience and resilience, neutralizing the weaknesses within a person's soul and instilling them with strong faith. By drawing inspiration from this name of Allah, believers continuously pursue their spiritual development and enhance their resilience against all the difficulties of life.
fazileti: Reciting the name El-Mukît helps a person overcome the challenges they encounter in life. Reading this name with intention provides great benefits not only for material sustenance but also for fulfilling spiritual and emotional needs. It brings tranquility to the heart, alleviates troubles, and instills a sense of assurance that every need in life will be met. Believers are encouraged to increase their submission to Allah and turn towards Him while reciting this name.

kisa_anlam: The One who accounts for everything, the Sufficient.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Hasib reflects the attribute of Allah who accounts for everything and is sufficient in all matters. This name is one of the most beautiful names of Allah, known as the Lord who is sufficient for His servants in all their states, fulfilling their needs and watching over them. Al-Hasib is like an artist who oversees the affairs of people, being present with them in every situation, knowing the things they do not know, and is there for His servants in every sorrow and distress.

From a Sufi perspective, Al-Hasib reminds us that no one can do anything on their own; all affairs belong to Allah. What is required of the servants is to strive and to dissolve their doubts, fears, and anxieties in the depth of this name. The manifestation of the name Al-Hasib provides people with trust and tranquility; the one who reflects upon this name realizes that everything is under Allah's control and understands the importance of seeking refuge in Allah during every hardship.

Mentioning the name Al-Hasib in prayers and acts of worship signifies a request for help and sufficiency from Allah. This name enables the believer, especially in times of difficulty, to remember 'Al-Hasib' and feel that they are not alone, and that everything is under Allah's supervision. In times of hardship and distress, the servants will find strength in the spiritual light of this name and will feel that they are not alone.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Hasib provides a person with spiritual intensity and peace. Remembering this name makes an individual feel how close they are to Allah, freeing them from all kinds of troubles and anxieties. Especially for those in need, reciting this name while seeking solutions for their material or spiritual troubles invites Allah's help and blessed manifestations. Therefore, every prayer and remembrance that emphasizes the name Al-Hasib helps the individual to harbor a deep spirituality in their vocabulary and reinforces the courage they derive from being sufficient.

kisa_anlam: The Majestic, the Glorious, the Exalted.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Al-Jalil signifies majesty and grandeur. It indicates that Allah's exalted existence holds authority and power over all created beings. This name serves as a reflection of His unique attributes, reminding humanity of His greatness and exaltedness. Al-Jalil also carries a depth that allows individuals to recognize their own helplessness and their position before Allah.

From a Sufi perspective, the name Al-Jalil triggers a process of spiritual elevation and maturation. The remembrance of this name elevates the heart and reinforces the feeling of submission by reminding one of Allah's immense majesty. The Quran contains many verses that express Allah's jalal, encouraging people to reflect and turn towards Him.

For those who experience the profound contemplation and spiritual journey of Islam, the name Al-Jalil is a source of divine tranquility and peace. Remembering this name helps individuals find inner peace and draw closer to Allah. Additionally, knowing this attribute in social relations fosters dignity and respect among people. It is evident that the spiritual aspect of the name Al-Jalil possesses a unifying quality that connects individuals to one another.
fazileti: The remembrance of the name Al-Jalil creates deep tranquility and serenity in the hearts of believers. Constantly invoking this name strengthens a person's connection to Allah and provides balance in their spiritual life. Moreover, while mentioning this name, it prepares the ground for the individual to elevate themselves and approach the majestic Allah, leading to the purification of their heart. Particularly in difficult times, the repetition of the name 'Al-Jalil' serves as an effective supplication for finding strength and courage.

kisa_anlam: Generous, one who bestows all kinds of goodness and gifts.
detayli_aciklama:
Al-Karim is a name that embodies the highest examples of generosity and hospitality. The invocation of Allah by this name reminds us of His boundless grace and mercy. Allah, who exhibits infinite generosity towards His creations, demonstrates His obligation to respond to everyone's needs and to provide all kinds of goodness. This name imparts a spiritual and moral depth, instilling peace and security in the hearts of His servants.

The manifestation of this name serves as a source of inspiration for individuals to be generous and to assist others. In a world where the mercy of Allah, the Generous, is evident, people are encouraged to emulate these qualities and to engage in acts of kindness towards others. Generosity facilitates the strengthening of social relationships and the spread of love and solidarity within the community. Al-Karim teaches one to look upon those in need with a compassionate and helpful gaze.

This word also symbolizes the purification from ignorance and poverty, as Allah, the Generous, is gentle and understanding towards the weaknesses of His servants. Just as it is expected for a person to increase their own grace or generosity, it also indicates that such generosity is a preparation for the Day of Judgment. Therefore, a Muslim who is invoked by the name Al-Karim will discover riches within their inner world and contribute to society as a source of inspiration for those around them.
fazileti: Reciting the name Al-Karim enhances the desire for generosity and sharing in a person's heart. Those who pronounce this name are encouraged to reflect Allah’s gifts and generosity in their own lives. During remembrance, contemplating Allah’s infinite grace and mercy enriches a person's spiritual world and increases the desire to help others.

kisa_anlam: The Watchful and Protector over all things.
detayli_aciklama:
The name Er-Rakîb expresses Allah's attribute of being the Watcher and Recorder of everything. This name signifies a watcher who knows the secrets of His servants, perceives even their most hidden thoughts, and records every moment of their lives. The awareness that every action and word of a person is being observed encourages them to be cautious and strengthens their will.

This name also highlights the reality that every event, behavior, and intention in a person's life will be recorded.
